headline: Fifth Third Bancorp (FITB) Lags Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
summary: Fifth Third Bancorp (FITB) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of -1.16% and -0.86%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

headline: How The Northern Trust (NTRS) Investment Narrative Is Evolving With Shifting Analyst Valuations
summary: Northern Trust’s consolidated fair value estimate has been nudged lower from US$155.82 to about US$153.04, a change of roughly 1.8% that reflects updated inputs across recent research. Some firms have raised price targets by as much as US$20, while others have trimmed them by up to US$18, so this small move captures a blend of optimism and caution in the latest analyst work. As you read on, you will see how to track and interpret this evolving narrative around Northern Trust’s...
